name: Dua Wajah Arjuna
overview: Arjuna was born as a miserable boy without any strengths. Face, wallet, to his brain, everything is below the standard. One day, a mysterious grandfather gives him a magic spray that transforms his face into a handsome one. Since then, Arjuna's life has changed.

trailers.title: Dua Wajah Arjuna - Official Teaser Trailer | Coming Soon On WeTV
